heat_status: North Pacific - High probabilities of MHWs are forecast across the central and western North Pacific (70-100% [30-60%]; low confidence) at least through June. MHW probability remains elevated near Baja California (40-70% [20-50%]; low-medium confidence) and is expected to increase by June (70-90% [30-50%]; low-medium confidence). | Tropical Pacific - Through June 2026, MHW likelihoods are expected to increase in the eastern tropical Pacific (60-80% [20-50%]; medium-high confidence), and decrease in the western tropical Pacific (50-80% [0-20%]; low-medium confidence), consistent with the development of El Niño. By October 2026, widespread MHW (70-90% [50-70%]; medium-high confidence) are expected across the eastern tropical Pacific.
north_pacific: High probabilities of MHWs are forecast across the central and western North Pacific (70-100% [30-60%]; low confidence) at least through June. MHW probability remains elevated near Baja California (40-70% [20-50%]; low-medium confidence) and is expected to increase by June (70-90% [30-50%]; low-medium confidence).
tropical_pacific: Through June 2026, MHW likelihoods are expected to increase in the eastern tropical Pacific (60-80% [20-50%]; medium-high confidence), and decrease in the western tropical Pacific (50-80% [0-20%]; low-medium confidence), consistent with the development of El Niño. By October 2026, widespread MHW (70-90% [50-70%]; medium-high confidence) are expected across the eastern tropical Pacific.
